---
name: Feature request / 功能建议
about: Suggest an improvement for v2rayM / 提出改进建议
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement / 问题背景

What problem are you trying to solve?

你想解决什么问题？

## Proposed Solution / 期望方案

Describe the workflow or behavior you want.

请描述你希望实现的流程或行为。

## Alternatives Considered / 替代方案

What approaches did you already evaluate?

你是否已经考虑过其他方案？

## Additional Context / 额外说明

Add screenshots, examples, or compatibility notes if relevant.

如有帮助，请补充截图、示例或兼容性说明。
